response.justification: While Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and open-source contributions, he lacks demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in fintech, has no evidence of leading engineering teams at scale-up stage, and his resume contains significant inconsistencies (e.g., claiming current roles at Google and Amazon starting in 2025, which is in the future). His background is heavily oriented toward general software development and open-source tools, with no clear alignment to AI-native fintech infrastructure, real-time credit risk systems, or regulated AI deployment.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across multiple languages and platforms
Active open-source contributor with tangible production-grade tools
Experience with event-driven systems and distributed infrastructure
concerns: No verifiable experience building or operating multi-agent AI systems in production
Claimed employment at Google and Amazon starting in 2025 is chronologically impossible
Lacks demonstrated leadership scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people or in fintech/regulatory contexts
